mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_sessions (user_id, agent_type, title, model_name, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{agentType}, #{title}, #{modelName}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.title, s.agent_type, s.model_name, COUNT(m.id) AS message_count, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM ai_chat_sessions s LEFT JOIN ai_chat_messages m ON m.session_id = s.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.agent_type = #{agentType} AND s.status >= 0 GROUP BY s.id, s.title, s.agent_type, s.model_name, s.created_at, s.updated_at ORDER BY s.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_sessions SET title = #{title} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ai_chat_sessions SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
